summary: Network Analytics feature testing completed successfully. All backend API tests pass (12/12) and frontend UI tests pass. The new /api/referrals/{user_id}/network-analytics endpoint returns comprehensive data including health score, subscription distribution, level distribution, top performers, and re-engagement opportunities.
critical_code_review_comments: Network Analytics endpoint (lines 24165-24320) is well-structured with proper error handling
Health score calculation uses weighted factors: activity rate (40%), subscription quality (30%), level depth (15%), recent growth (15%)
Frontend modal properly displays all sections with appropriate color coding for health score
Re-engagement Opportunities section includes 'Remind' buttons for inactive users
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user with 6 test referrals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Network Analytics feature is fully functional. The admin user has 6 referrals with varying subscription plans (Elite: 1, Growth: 1, Startup: 1, Explorer: 3). Health score is 50 (Needs Attention) due to 50% activity rate. 3 inactive users are shown in Re-engagement Opportunities section.

Network Analytics Modal.details: Opens correctly when clicking 'Network Analytics' button on /referrals page

Network Health Score.details: Displays score of 50 with 'Needs Attention' badge and orange color coding

Subscription Distribution.details: Shows breakdown: Elite=1, Growth=1, Startup=1, Explorer=3

Level Distribution.details: Shows L1-L5 with active/inactive breakdown (L1: 3/5 active, L2: 0/1)

Top Performers.details: Lists 5 top earners with PRC balance and active status

API Endpoint.details: /api/referrals/{user_id}/network-analytics returns valid JSON with all required fields

Untapped Potential Banner.details: Shows '+25% extra bonus' opportunity when inactive users exist
